description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular wooden structure with a rich, dark wood grain on its main body and lighter wood framing the edges. The front is adorned with four drawers, each decorated with geometric inlays and diamond-shaped accents, giving it a classic, ornate appearance. The top and sides are embellished with intricate, laser-etched or carved geometric patterns, adding a touch of artistry and craftsmanship. The chest sits on a glossy black base, which contrasts with the matte wood finish and elevates the piece visually. The drawers are equipped with small, diamond-shaped handles, seamlessly integrated into the decorative motifs. No visible locks or brand markings are present, and the overall design suggests a blend of traditional and decorative urban furniture.
description: A decorative wooden chest of drawers with four ornate drawers, geometric inlays, and intricate carved patterns, set on a glossy black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with diamond-shaped handles and decorative inlays, framed by lighter wood edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intricate geometric pattern on the side panel and the rectangular shape of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wood grain panel with no drawers or decorations, emphasizing the contrast between the back and the ornate front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the geometric pattern seen in view 1, with the same lighter wood framing.
